name: automated-seo-mailer
description: Automated Tricel PageSpeed reporting with Node.js, EmailJS, GitHub Pages, GitHub Actions, and a secure refresh trigger.

scripts.worker:migrate:local: cd trigger-worker && wrangler d1 migrations apply pagespeed-reports --local
scripts.worker:migrate:remote: cd trigger-worker && wrangler d1 migrations apply pagespeed-reports --remote
